title: Define repository boundary errors
scenario: Repository failures are infrastructure boundary failures. Keep them distinct from domain rule failures.
instructions: Define RepositoryError with Unavailable and Conflict variants and implement Display.

hints.body: Keep the Translating errors across boundaries code active and define RepositoryError with Unavailable and Conflict variants and implement Display.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Define repository boundary errors is shown below.

completionExplanation: Define repository boundary errors now extends the active Translating errors across boundaries code with boundary repo error. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
